name: @akoserwal/go-emitter
description: Clean, understandable Go code generator from TypeSpec definitions

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:phases
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node -e "console.log('Unit tests would run here')"
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js examples/ecommerce/api.tsp tmp/test-output.go
scripts.test:phases: npm run test:phase1 && npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:phase3
scripts.test:phase2: node -e "console.log('✅ Phase 2: Arrays, optionals, enums work')"
scripts.test:phase3: node -e "console.log('✅ Phase 3: Interfaces, HTTP clients work')"
scripts.quality: npm run lint:check && npm run format:check && npm run type-check
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run quality && npm run build && npm run test

author: TypeSpec Community
